org.docgene.model

Interface FontNamedSizeType


  • public interface FontNamedSizeType
    The list of named sizes for Fonts.
    Since:
    1.6.1
    See Also:
    XMLTextStyle.setSize(java.lang.String)

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static java.lang.String LARGE
      The large size.
      static java.lang.String LARGER
      The larger size.
      static java.lang.String MEDIUM
      The medium size.
      static java.lang.String SMALL
      The small size.
      static java.lang.String SMALLER
      The smaller size.
      static java.lang.String X_LARGE
      The x-large size.
      static java.lang.String X_SMALL
      The x-small size.
      static java.lang.String XX_LARGE
      The xx-large size.
      static java.lang.String XX_SMALL
      The xx-small size.
